details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. item_specifications.special_feature: 25L Large capacity, many pockets, can carry pet food, water, toys, poop bags, blankets, etc., convenient to travel with your pet., Fashionable appearance, easy to carry, can be used as a general backpack, out, camping, travel, dog travel backpack., The dog backpack can be bundled with blankets and has a special pocket for pet poop bags., With 2 silicone collapsible water bowls inside, convenient for pets to drink, the volume occupies a small dog bags for traveling., With 2 zippered pet food storage pockets inside, more convenient to carry and save pet food.

about_item: 25L CAPACITY - 3X LARGER THAN STANDARD 8L DOG TRAVEL BAGS: Stores complete 7-day trip supplies for small-medium dogs (up to 50 lbs): 10 lbs dry food, full week's treats, toys, leash, harness, first aid kit, waste bags, blanket, and records. One organized bag replaces multiple totes—eliminates forgotten items and car clutter. Perfect for weekend getaways to week-long vacations: road trips, camping, beach, cabins, or visiting family.

2 INSULATED FOOD CONTAINERS (5 LBS EACH) - KEEPS KIBBLE FRESH 7+ DAYS: Two BPA-free food-grade containers with airtight seals hold 10 lbs total (5 lbs each)—enough for a full week for 30-lb dogs or 4-5 days for 50-lb breeds. Insulated interior maintains freshness in hot cars or cold mountain campsites. Leak-proof design prevents spills in trunk. Wide-mouth opening for easy scooping. vs loose bags that attract pests or lose freshness—these containers protect food quality from day 1-7.

2 COLLAPSIBLE BOWLS (12 OZ) + WATERPROOF MAT - MESS-FREE FEEDING: Premium food-grade silicone bowls pop open in 3 seconds, collapse flat to 1" height for compact storage. Each holds 12 oz (1.5 cups) water or food—suitable for small-medium dogs. Carabiners clip to bag exterior, tent stakes, or collar for hands-free carrying. Waterproof 16"×12" placemat catches spills and prevents sand/dirt in car. Dishwasher-safe bowls. Perfect for hiking breaks, beach hydration stops, or hotel room feeding without messy cleanup.

AIRLINE APPROVED + 3 CARRY MODES - TSA COMPLIANT CARRY-ON: Meets TSA and most US airlines' under-seat requirements (United, Delta, American, Southwest). Fits under seat—no need to check bag or separate from your pet. Three ergonomic carry options: wear as backpack (adjustable 30-45" padded straps) for hands-free dog walking, carry by reinforced top handle, or slide onto rolling luggage handle. Weighs only 2.8 lbs empty—won't strain shoulders during airport sprints or long terminal walks.

HEAVY-DUTY 600D WATER-RESISTANT OXFORD - BUILT FOR OUTDOOR ADVENTURES: Commercial-grade 600D Oxford fabric (same as hiking backpacks) withstands rough handling, sharp claws, and outdoor elements. Water-resistant coating repels light rain and splashes (wipe spills immediately; not submersible). Reinforced double-stitched seams prevent tears. Easy-clean exterior wipes with damp cloth. Built for 100+ trips—from muddy trail hikes to sandy beaches to snowy cabin getaways.

summary.text: Customers find the travel bag to be of decent quality with amazing food containers, and appreciate its capacity to fit a lot of items, with one customer noting it can hold up to a week's worth of food. The bag is praised for being portable, with lots of pockets and zippers, and customers find it easy to carry and worth the price. While the appearance is nice, durability receives mixed feedback, with some finding it durable while others report it ripping easily.

authors_reviews.title: Fits so much food!
authors_reviews.text: This bag is perfect for a weekend getaway or a short 3-4 day trip. It fits about 4 days of kibble for my 90lb dog along with a few toys, treats, a sweater, extra poop bags, and an extra leash. The collapsible bowls hold the perfect amount of food and water for a meal, and the foldable mat was a perfect addition when we went camping in the mud. If mine ends up breaking down sometime in the future, I will immediately buy this exact same one again. It also feels very sturdy and supportive, and doesn’t feel cheap or thin. I can toss it around with the bag filled to the brim and not have any issues. The mat and bowls were especially easy to clean after being caked in the mud and threw the backpack into the washer without issue.
authors_reviews.author: Becca Holt

authors_reviews.title: Got for camping amazing product
authors_reviews.text: The bag is smaller than I thought it'd be. But makes sense since it is TSA approved.I used it for camping for four days for two dogs. It fit their food. I also brought a 1 gallon zip lock of food just in case. I'd say it fit that and their dog bowls.I wanted a bag I could keep their food in that was easy access to put in the car at night to avoid bears and unwanted critters coming into our camp.The bag is high quality. It seemed easy to clean and compacted down to take up very little space with travel.It did what I needed it to do. The bag is very high quality. The bowls that come with it are really nice and compact. They're not big, but again, for it being used for the purpose of travel it did what I needed it to do.The bowls that came with are very sturdy and easy to clean. They collapse! You always need collapsible bowls when it comes to traveling with dogs.Especially nice as a grab and go bag. No worry about forgetting bowls if you keep the ones that came with the bag inside of it :)
authors_reviews.author: Katie

authors_reviews.title: Fantastic, just one thing I'd change
authors_reviews.text: I was NOT looking to spend this much on a bag for the dog, but I'm glad I did. This is super convenient, is pretty comfortable, and i can definitely chuck it around with no issue. I wish it had a water bottle holder on the side, and while i'm very glad theres the doggy bag dispenser on the side (very handy) you can't put a bottle in there and easily pull a bag out as well. Maybe one more zipper pocket on the inside would make this absolutely perfect, but its worth the price. Its like a doggy diaper bag, you can fit SO much stuff in it.Perhaps a clip one could stick a carabiner on would be ideal also, as the included bowls have clips on them but no clear place to hook them on. I'll probably sew a loop or two on the outside for the future, but i'm very satisfied with this purchase.The kibble containers are a little annoying to clean, so while I still put food in them, I treat them more like coolers and the kibble goes in plastic bags first.
authors_reviews.author: Anna R

authors_reviews.title: Great product!
authors_reviews.text: We often travel with our pupper and I was always just shoving her stuff in a reusable bag. It didn’t stay sorted and I found myself searching through a pile of dog essentials whenever I needed something. This is stylish, roomy, and good quality. Lots of pockets and zippers. The collapsible bowls are convenient. Great to travel with.
authors_reviews.author: Tammy

authors_reviews.title: Based the price it’s perfect.
authors_reviews.text: We haven't used it yet and the quality is equal to what you pay for it. The design and size is perfect. I suspect a years worth of life. Maybe I’ll review again in the future.
authors_reviews.author: Placeholder

authors_reviews.title: Fantastic for taking dogs on trips!
authors_reviews.text: If you're taking your dog somewhere, get this bag!I bought this so it would be easier to take dog supplies with us when we went on a 4 day road-trip with our pups. I have small dogs, so all of their food fit in one of the 2 containers. I decided to put treats in the other (in a sealed bag so the treats didn't dry out). It was very helpful having 2 collapsible bowls so I could use one specifically for water, and one specifically for food. I'm picky and don't like having bits of food in their water, so having separate bowls was a big plus. When we got to our hotel, having the mat was great to avoid having water spill on the floor. The poop bag dispenser on the side is a GAME CHANGER. It doesn't rip off bags, so you have to rip them off yourself, but it's so convenient having it right there. Since there's so much extra room in the bag, we had room for potty training pads, a blanket, toys, medicines, and more. Since I'm not going anywhere again anytime soon, it's now going to be a doomsday go-bag so I have all of their supplies ready in case we need to get the heck outta dodge in a hurry. I love this bag!
authors_reviews.author: Myranda

authors_reviews.title: Highly recommend
authors_reviews.text: Very big i can fit a lot in it. The bowls are really well made. To tell you just how good this bag is this is the second one I bought because the first one my brother set outside of our car forgot about the hit it with the car drug it a few feet before he realized what it was and when he got it it had very minimal cosmetic damage nothing inside was damaged it really was Probably still fine to use i just did not like the way it looked so 10/10 highly recommend
authors_reviews.author: Ashley

authors_reviews.title: Perfect travel bag
authors_reviews.text: Love this bag! Perfect for traveling with pets!
authors_reviews.author: Justice Franks
